Our Story

Luxury Redefined
in the Heart of Etah

GRAK Hotel stands as Etah's premier luxury destination, weaving together the timeless warmth of Indian hospitality with contemporary elegance. Nestled in the cultural heart of Uttar Pradesh, we offer an unparalleled sanctuary for discerning travellers.

Every corner of GRAK tells a story — from the hand-crafted interiors inspired by Mughal architecture to the bespoke service that anticipates your every need before you even know it.

World-Class Facilities

Curated Amenities

◈

Infinity Pool

Rooftop pool with panoramic views of Etah's skyline, open year-round.

◉

Luxury Spa

Ayurvedic treatments and modern therapies in our award-winning wellness centre.

◆

Fitness Centre

State-of-the-art equipment, personal training, and yoga sessions at sunrise.

◇

Business Lounge

Private meeting rooms, high-speed internet, and dedicated concierge support.

✦

Banquet Hall

Grand venues for weddings, galas, and corporate events for up to 500 guests.

◑

Rooftop Lounge

Sunset cocktails and live music every evening under the Uttar Pradesh sky.

▲

Kids Club

Supervised activities, games, and cultural workshops for young guests.

❋

24/7 Butler

Personal butler service ensuring every request is fulfilled with grace and efficiency.

Fine Dining Experience
Awadhi Cuisine

Culinary Arts

A Feast for
All Senses

GRAK's culinary programme celebrates the rich heritage of Awadhi cuisine alongside global flavours, curated by award-winning Chef Anand Sharma.

Guest Voices

Stories of Delight

★★★★★
"

A stay at GRAK is nothing short of magical. The Maharaja Suite transported me to a world of absolute luxury. The staff remembered my name from the moment I arrived — extraordinary service.

— Priya Mehta, Mumbai

★★★★★
"

The Awadhi cuisine at GRAK is the best I've had outside of Lucknow. The Dum Biryani alone is worth the drive to Etah. The rooftop lounge at sunset was an unforgettable experience.

— Rahul Verma, Delhi

★★★★★
"

We hosted our daughter's wedding at GRAK and every detail was handled to perfection. The banquet hall looked breathtaking, and the entire team went far beyond our expectations.

— Sunita & Ajay Gupta, Agra

Find Us

In the Heart
of Etah

Situated in prime Etah, GRAK Hotel is conveniently accessible from the main city centre, railway station, and key heritage sites of Uttar Pradesh.
